test_gaps: Scout does not specify concrete tests to validate the correctness or security of the proposed implementations.
risks: Use of external web search (brave_search) can introduce untrusted data into the research process.
Code analysis tools may be resource intensive and could affect performance on large codebases.
recommendation_notes: While Scout's tool set aligns with the agent definitions, the lack of explicit testing and the inclusion of external web search pose risks. Recommend revising the proposal to add concrete test steps and consider limiting or sanitizing web-derived information before use.
